category_sources: Official Zola documentation says Zola is a static site generator similar to Hugo, Pelican, and Jekyll.
source_facts.description: Fast static site generator in a single binary with everything built-in.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses the product name Zola.
docs_sources: Official getzola.org documentation has a dedicated Getting Started overview and documentation navigation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/getzola/zola; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Zola docs say it is written in Rust, uses Tera templates, and writes content in CommonMark Markdown.
